# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description | strip_newlines | strip }}

{{ site.author.name | default: site.title }} writes about GitHub Copilot, VS Code,
Codespaces, agentic workflows, cloud-native technologies, and developer experience.
This file is a machine-readable index for LLMs and AI assistants. A full-text version
of every post is available at {{ '/llms-full.txt' | absolute_url }}.

## Pages

- [Home]({{ '/' | absolute_url }}): Landing page and profile overview.
- [Posts]({{ '/posts/' | absolute_url }}): Full list of technical articles and tutorials.
- [About]({{ '/about/' | absolute_url }}): Background, experience, and community work.
- [Photography]({{ '/photography/' | absolute_url }}): Analog and film photography gallery.
- [RSS Feed]({{ '/feed.xml' | absolute_url }}): Subscribe to new posts.

## Posts
